_comment: Config for sync-analysts.py. Copy to sync-analysts.config.json and edit. Live file is gitignored.
_notes: Each analyst CSV must contain all 4 positions stacked, separated by banner rows.
Banner row pattern: column 1 = '{POS} Ranks' where POS is one of QB / RB / WR / TE.
The row immediately after the banner must be the column header (ID, SDIO, Name, Team, Rank, Comments).
Adding a new analyst = drop their CSV in data/source/analysts/ + add an entry above + re-run sync-analysts.py.
